examples: Irene forgave Terry for stealing her money.
A Chevrolet dealership donated $10,000 and forgave the district's $10,750 bill for renting the driver educating cars.
I forgave those who hurt me.
Karen added that she and her family forgave her sister's killers "as Gayle would have done".
But he forgave the former colonial power when a British man gave him a bicycle.
